title: Database Pool Exhaustion Workflow
headline: Approval-aware workflow for a high-impact database incident.
description: Starts the full workflow using the failing and previous healthy database logs, pauses for approval, and highlights grounded evidence plus remediation planning.

request_body.prompt: Investigate this incident using the failing run and the previous healthy run.

notes: Use this profile first when you want to show thread creation, evidence collection, citations, and approval pause.
Approve from the console to reveal the final report and refreshed incident timeline.

operator_steps: Load the incident and run the workflow.
Review the evidence panel and the approval request.
Approve the workflow to complete the report and refresh the incident timeline.
